current_phase.label: Control-plane UI maintenance and workspace standardization

current_milestone.label: Canonical docs, route-aware verification, and closeout workflow hardening

progress_summary: The control-plane UI remains the operator-facing surface for task orchestration, approvals, and runtime visibility. Canonical project docs, routing entrypoints, and PR closeout template are now standardized so new sessions can recover current context without broad workspace search.
next_step: Keep UI and backend contract changes synchronized, maintain served-route verification for live-facing fixes, and continue updating the canonical entry docs whenever operator-visible workflow changes.
